display_name.description: The display name of the plugin. Max length is 50 characters (Unicode code points).

location.description: Resource ID segment making up resource `name`. It identifies the resource within its parent collection as described in https://google.aip.dev/122.
location.rationale: Identifier only. Does not contain secrets or security-sensitive data.

plugin_id.description: The ID to use for the Plugin resource, which will become the final component of the Plugin's resource name. This field is optional. * If provided, the same will be used. The service will throw an error if the specified id is already used by another Plugin resource in the API hub instance. * If not provided, a system generated id will be used. This value should be 4-63 characters, overall resource name which will be of format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/plugins/{plugin}`, its length is limited to 1000 characters and valid characters are /a-z[0-9]-_/.
plugin_id.rationale: Acts as identifier. No inherent security risk.

description.description: The plugin description. Max length is 2000 characters (Unicode code points).
description.rationale: Human-readable description only. No security impact.

actions_config.description: The configuration of actions supported by the plugin. Structure is [documented below](#nested_actions_config).
actions_config.rationale: Action metadata only, no secrets or sensitive data.

display_name.description: The display name of the action.

description.description: The description of the operation performed by the action.

trigger_mode.description: The trigger mode supported by the action. Possible values: TRIGGER_MODE_UNSPECIFIED API_HUB_ON_DEMAND_TRIGGER API_HUB_SCHEDULE_TRIGGER NON_API_HUB_MANAGED

external_uri.description: The uri of the externally hosted documentation.
external_uri.rationale: Points to external docs. No secret values.

config_template.description: ConfigTemplate represents the configuration template for a plugin. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template).
config_template.rationale: Template structure only. Sensitivity comes from nested attributes.

auth_config_template.description: AuthConfigTemplate represents the authentication template for a plugin. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template_auth_config_template).
auth_config_template.rationale: Container for auth config. Not directly sensitive.

additional_config_template.description: The list of additional configuration variables for the plugin's configuration. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template_additional_config_template).
additional_config_template.rationale: Additional metadata. Security depends on nested values.

hosting_service.description: The information related to the service implemented by the plugin developer, used to invoke the plugin's functionality. Structure is [documented below](#nested_hosting_service).
hosting_service.rationale: Defines where service is hosted. Not a secret.

service_uri.description: The URI of the service implemented by the plugin developer, used to invoke the plugin's functionality. This information is only required for user defined plugins.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

auth_config_template.rationale: Container for auth configuration. Sensitive data handled inside child attributes.

supported_auth_types.description: The list of authentication types supported by the plugin.
supported_auth_types.rationale: Lists allowed auth mechanisms. Not a secret but security-relevant in configuration enforcement.

service_account.description: Config for Google service account authentication. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template_auth_config_template_service_account).
service_account.rationale: Container for service account settings. Secret risk exists at child level.
Container object only. Sensitive at child level.

service_account.description: The service account to be used for authenticating request. The `iam.serviceAccounts.getAccessToken` permission should be granted on this service account to the impersonator service account.
service_account.rationale: Directly references a service account used for authentication. Exposure could compromise system access.

additional_config_template.rationale: Template object. Only sensitive if value_type is SECRET.

required.description: Flag represents that this `ConfigVariable` must be provided for a PluginInstance.

enum_options.description: Enum options. To be populated if `ValueType` is `ENUM`. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template_additional_config_template_additional_config_template_enum_options).

multi_select_options.description: Multi select options. To be populated if `ValueType` is `MULTI_SELECT`. Structure is [documented below](#nested_config_template_additional_config_template_additional_config_template_multi_select_options).

id.description: ID of the config variable. Must be unique within the configuration.

value_type.description: Type of the parameter: string, int, bool etc. Possible values: VALUE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED STRING INT BOOL SECRET ENUM MULTI_SELECT MULTI_STRING MULTI_INT
value_type.rationale: Indicates type of value. Not sensitive itself.

validation_regex.description: Regular expression in RE2 syntax used for validating the `value` of a `ConfigVariable`.

enum_options.rationale: Option metadata only. Not security relevant.

multi_select_options.rationale: Option metadata only. Not security relevant.

conditions.condition: Auth types not set to allowed types
